assumptions.a2_arbitrage: A-2 corrective capacity is L/2 per day at elasticity 1; it is empirical and phase-revalidated.
assumptions.baseline_contest_floor: Synthetic 250,000-USDC Baseline contest floor, a TREASURY-tier analogy to 08 §4.3; pending a specification question.
assumptions.coverage_leg: Scheduled observations provide an always-clean coverage leg in Phase-0 synthetic runs.
assumptions.envelope_validation: 05 §5.6/08 §5.5 applies only to causal wrong-PASS displacement flips; observed loss non-monotonicity is reported fail-closed as inconclusive rather than inferred from endpoints.
assumptions.pol_leg: POL is assumed seeded at the class schedule and undisturbed for step-5 grading.
assumptions.reporting_gate: Per 15 §4.9 and 08 §5.2/§5.5, publication gates on per-class |true_effect|>=delta harmful proposals and sub-3P brackets; the distribution-weighted aggregate remains reported.
assumptions.threshold_search: Every observed attacked wrong-PASS candidate receives a state-identical zero-budget counterfactual and a binary budget bracket at the configured 5% relative tolerance; a pre-registered beneficial sample supplies griefing diagnostics.
assumptions.undefined_prize: An explicit undefined envelope proxy is represented as null and rejects SecuritySizing.

thin_market_capture.confirmed_spec_seam: Attack-generated gross attacker+arbitrage flow can promote a below-v_min decision book and simultaneously inflate step-9 L_hat/AttackCost_hat; 05 §5.6 caps wash flow only inside ManipFloor_hat.C_hold.

violations: param: decidable-harm false-pass rate is not below 1%
treasury: decidable-harm false-pass rate is not below 1%
sub-3P threshold brackets are not clean in every class
wrong-PASS displacement bracket violates ManipFloor/AttackCost envelope
